title: taraxacum laetiforme
intro: Taraxacum laetiforme, also known as the yellow dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaf edges. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum laetiforme lie in its roots and leaves, which contain compounds like taraxasterol and inulin, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of the plant include its potential in lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum laetiforme can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
